name: Ani
appearance: Ani is a tall, muscular, tanned woman from Osirion, with facial features common to her homeland, vivid purple eyes, and white hair worn in long braids. She wears a flowing white puff-sleeved shirt over an off-white top that leaves her chest and abs visible, along with thigh-high shorts and sturdy sandals suited for long marches and combat. When excitement surges through her, her skin begins to glow as if fire burns just beneath it.
proficiencies: Sacred fists are proficient with the club, crossbow (light or heavy), dagger, handaxe, javelin, kama, nunchaku, quarterstaff, sai, shortspear, short sword, shuriken, siangham, sling, and spear. Sacred fists are not proficient with any armor or shields. When wearing armor, using shield, or carrying a medium or heavy load, a sacred fist loses his AC bonus and flurry of blows

feats.name: Deft Dodger
feats.desc: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Reflex saves.

feats.name: Desert Child (desert)
feats.desc: You were born and raised in rocky deserts. You gain a +4 trait bonus on saving throws against hot conditions and a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against fire effects.

traits.name: Deft Dodger
traits.desc: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Reflex saves.

traits.name: Desert Child (desert)
traits.desc: You were born and raised in rocky deserts. You gain a +4 trait bonus on saving throws against hot conditions and a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against fire effects.

racialFeatures.name: Celestial Resistance
racialFeatures.desc: Aasimars have acid resistance 5, cold resistance 5, and electricity resistance 5.

racialFeatures.name: Skilled
racialFeatures.desc: Emberkin have a +2 racial bonus on Knowledge (planes) and Spellcraft checks.

racialFeatures.name: Spell-Like Ability
racialFeatures.desc: Emberkin gain pyrotechnics as a spell-like ability.

classFeatures.name: AC Bonus (Su)
classFeatures.desc: A sacred fist adds Wisdom to AC and CMD while unarmored and unencumbered. These bonuses apply against touch attacks and while flat-footed, but are lost when immobilized, helpless, armored, shielded, or heavily loaded.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Law (Ex)
classFeatures.desc: You project a faint lawful aura.

classFeatures.name: Blessings (Su)
classFeatures.desc: You can call upon the power of your blessings 3 times per day. The DC for these blessings is 14.

classFeatures.name: Spontaneous Casting
classFeatures.desc: A good warpriest can expend any prepared spell that isn't an orison to cast any cure spell of the same spell level or lower. Casting Cure Light Wounds consumes a 1st-level prepared spell slot (Shield of Faith or Protection from Evil), not a dedicated CLW slot. Current system approximates this as 2/day (= number of 1st-level slots). Proper slot-sharing requires Tier S3 slot tracking.

classFeatures.name: Powerful Healer (Su)
classFeatures.desc: As a swift action, you can treat any cure spell as if it were empowered, causing it to heal 50% more damage or deal 50% more damage to undead.

classFeatures.name: Strength Surge (Su)
classFeatures.desc: As a swift action you gain a +1 enhancement bonus on melee attack rolls, Strength-based combat maneuver checks, Strength-based skills, and Strength checks for 1 round.

weapons.name: Crossbow, Heavy
weapons.special: Loading a heavy crossbow is a fullround action that provokes attacks of opportunity.

list.name: Pyrotechnics
list.duration: 1d4+1 rounds, or 1d4+1 rounds after creatures leave the smoke cloud; see text [D]
list.target: One fire source, up to a 20-ft. cube
list.save: Will negates or Fortitude negates; see text; Spell
list.effect: Pyrotechnics turns a fire into a burst of blinding fireworks or a thick cloud of choking smoke, depending on your choice.

list.name: Detect Poison
list.target: Or Area one creature, one object, or a 5-ft. cube
list.effect: You determine whether a creature, object, or area has been poisoned or is poisonous.

list.name: Resistance
list.target: You imbue the subject with magical energy that protects it from harm, granting it a +1 resistance bonus on saves.

list.name: Stabilize
list.effect: Upon casting this spell, you target a living creature that has -1 or fewer hit points.

list.name: Cure Light Wounds
list.effect: Heals 1d8+1 hit points to a living creature. Damages undead by the same amount.

list.name: Protection from Evil
list.effect: +2 deflection bonus to AC and +2 resistance bonus on saves against spells from evil creatures. Wards from evil creatures, mental control, and summoned creatures.

list.name: Shield of Faith
list.effect: +2 deflection bonus to AC. Creates a shimmering field that averts and deflects attacks.
